INDUSTRIAL AREA POLICE STATION — OCCURRENCE BOOK EXTRACT
OB No. 22/28/06/24
Date: 28 June 2024
Time: 0700 hrs

Reporting officer: PC Kariuki (Service No. 88107)

Particulars:
Suspects Musa Hassan and Kevin Mutua, held since 24 June 2024 in
connection with the protests near Parliament Road, were transferred to
Industrial Area Police Station at 0445 hrs. Suspects were processed and
the bond schedule was not entered. The suspects requested to call counsel;
the request was denied pending instruction from the investigating officer.

It was further noted that suspects had not been produced before a magistrate
within twenty-four hours of arrest.

Signed: PC Kariuki
Counter-signed: IP Mwangi
